title: Hero's Anchor Optimizer
description:
A mod that optimizes respawn anchor explosions on servers

Allowed pretty much everywhere
body:
# Hero's Anchor Optimizer
## What does it do?
- Optimization that fixes waiting on the server after anchor explosion before anchor block is removed. Replaces it with a visibly different 'fake' anchor (that can be replaced like a fern) to not change functionality of airplacing. This allows you to not have to wait for the server to be able to place another block in the same place.

## Is this allowed?
** Allowed on many major servers such as:**

- Vanilla+
- PVP Legacy
- USPVP
- MCPVP
- DonutSMP
- LeoneMC
- Vanilla (Crystal PVP) Tier list

  but please ask before using on any servers that aren't on this list or haven't explicitly allowed it.

## How to use?
- Plop into your .minecraft/mods folder
- Make sure to have fabric api (for versions <1.21.11)

## I want to change the fake anchor texture
- You can do this with a pack. You can either change the model in

_assets\herosanchoroptimizer\models\block\fake_anchor.json_

or change individual textures in 

_assets\herosanchoroptimizer\models\block\fake_anchor_side.png_ and/or
_assets\herosanchoroptimizer\models\block\fake_anchor_vertical.png_ 

## Compatibility
- Should work with any mods that don't edit an anchor's functionality.

## Contact Me:
Any problems, questions, help:
https://discord.gg/4ta7pM4bnr
Let me know if there are any problems in my discord!
